tensions.resolution_choice: Use @codemirror/lang-markdown's markdownLanguage export (the GFM-enabled variant) via markdown({base: markdownLanguage}). RT-1 verified 2026-05-01: all V1 Lezer node types present without importing @lezer/markdown directly; package.json untouched.

propagation_effects.note: Must verify GFM is reachable without a new top-level package
If GFM unavailable, table/image scope must be relaxed

validation_criteria: package-lock.json shows no new top-level dependency added
Lezer parse tree on a GFM table source produces distinct Table/TableRow/TableCell nodes

tensions.resolution_choice: A: Two sibling pattern families sharing the same skeleton (ViewPlugin + RangeSetBuilder + selectionTouches). Inline plugins use Decoration.replace; block plugins use Decoration.replace({block: true}) or line decorations. T4 refined to 'reuse the skeleton, not necessarily the exact replace shape.'

propagation_effects.note: Refined wording captures the actual intent

validation_criteria: Block-level decorations (table, fenced code, blockquote) and inline decorations live in separate modules under frontend/src/lib/editor/decorations/{inline,block}/
Both module families import the same selectionTouches helper

tensions.resolution_choice: A: Memoize widget instances keyed by (node range, source-slice hash). WidgetType.eq() short-circuits Decoration.replace. Edits inside a table rebuild only that table.

propagation_effects.note: Cache cuts amortised cost; p95 budget stays achievable

validation_criteria: Performance test: editing a paragraph adjacent to a 10x10 table produces zero new widget instances for the table
WidgetType.eq returns true for unchanged widgets across rebuilds

triz.parameters: Throughput debounce vs Latency on reveal

tensions.resolution_choice: A: Segment rebuild policy by trigger. Selection-change rebuilds run immediately (cheap; only selectionTouches recheck). Doc-change rebuilds debounced. T2 refined.

propagation_effects.note: Spec now distinguishes selection-rebuild (immediate) from doc-rebuild (debounced)

validation_criteria: e2e: typing arrow-key into a wikilink reveals source within one frame (no 16ms+ ghost)
Doc-change rebuilds still debounced via requestAnimationFrame

tensions.resolution_choice: A: Single Playwright test loads a seed page containing every V1 construct family, then asserts cursor-out (rendered) and cursor-in (source) for each. Reduces ~12 new tests to 1 with thorough assertions. O1 refined.

propagation_effects.note: The single test must enumerate every U2 family

validation_criteria: e2e file under frontend/tests/e2e/ contains one describe block per V1 family
Suite runtime delta < 10s over current baseline

tensions.resolution_choice: O3 fixture page must fit within one initial viewport so all asserted constructs render on load. Without this, viewport-scoped decoration could leave the asserted construct off-screen and the smoke would pass vacuously.
validation_criteria: Asserted constructs all appear in the initial viewport at default editor height

tensions.resolution_choice: V1 image decoration accepts (a) absolute URLs subject to S1 allow-list, (b) /media/<sha> paths matching internal/media handler. Wiki-relative paths and attachment shorthands deferred to V2; per U4 they render as raw source.

propagation_effects.note: V1 image src scope narrowed to absolute + /media/<sha>

validation_criteria: Unit test: image decoration on /media/abc123 emits
Unit test: image decoration on relative path './foo.png' produces no decoration (raw source remains)

tensions.resolution_choice: A: Single shared Decorator base module — ViewPlugin scaffold, RangeSetBuilder driver, selectionTouches helper, safeURL — exported from frontend/src/lib/editor/decorations/base.ts. Per-family code is node-type matching + widget DOM only. Add CI bundle-size gate (`make build` fails on >30KB delta).

propagation_effects.note: Now requires CI gate, not manual check

validation_criteria: frontend/src/lib/editor/decorations/base.ts exists and is imported by every decoration plugin
make build prints bundle delta and exits non-zero on >30KB regression

evidence.test_name: RT-1: SATISFIED — all 13 required Lezer node types present
evidence.note: markdownLanguage from @codemirror/lang-markdown exposes Table/TableRow/TableCell/FencedCode/Blockquote/Image/ATXHeading1/Emphasis/StrongEmphasis/InlineCode/Link/BulletList/OrderedList without importing @lezer/markdown directly. T3 stays clean.

evidence.description: CM 6 docs guarantee Decoration.replace/widget/line do not modify state.doc; the existing wikiLinkDecorations ViewPlugin proves this in this codebase
WidgetType.eq() contract documented in CM 6; verifying via a benchmark in m4-generate
Parity test fixture: TS safeURL output matches Go safeURL for the same inputs across http/https/mailto/javascript:/data:/relative/fragment cases
Code review of every WidgetType.toDOM in m4-generate output; assert no innerHTML / outerHTML / dangerouslySetInnerHTML
This work is editor-only by spec (T5); m4 must produce no diff under internal/render or internal/wiki
Inline skeleton proven by existing wikiLinkDecorations; block-level sibling pattern (Decoration.replace({block: true})) is documented in CM 6 but not yet exercised in this codebase
make build prints gzipped index-*.js size; delta from baseline (191KB) must be ≤ 30KB
Smoke fixture markdown ≤ 30 lines; default editor min-height (60vh) renders all asserted constructs without scroll
Image-URL classifier unit tests: /media/<sha> pass, absolute URLs pass safeURL, relative paths produce no decoration
CI workflow runs make build and asserts bundle delta ≤ 30KB; fails the build on regression

binding_constraint.reason: RT-1 is the single research unknown gating V1 scope. If GFM extensions are not reachable via the already-transitive @lezer/markdown without adding a new top-level dep, U2 (Full) clashes with T3 and forces relaxation. Every other NOT_SATISFIED RT is implementation work that becomes mechanical once RT-1 closes; m4 should generate the RT-1 verification artifact first.

draft_required_truths.draft_statement: CodeMirror's RangeSet decoration system permits Decoration.replace without mutating state.doc
Server-side /api/pages render output is a pure function of file content; editor decorations cannot affect it
safeURL allow-list semantics from internal/render/markdown.go can be ported to the editor without behavior drift
@codemirror/lang-markdown's Lezer tree exposes distinct node types for headings, emphasis, code, links, lists, tables, blockquotes, images sufficient to drive per-construct decorations
ViewPlugin.update.viewportChanged + EditorView visible-range API enable off-viewport decoration deferral
The wikiLinkDecorations pattern (ViewPlugin + RangeSetBuilder + Decoration.replace + selectionTouches) generalises to all V1 inline constructs without per-construct re-architecture

gap_checklist_compliance.note: Data path: markdown source -> Lezer parse tree -> ViewPlugin.update -> RangeSetBuilder -> Decoration set -> DOM. No system boundaries crossed.

gap_checklist_compliance.skip_reason: No auth/crypto constraints in this feature

gap_checklist_compliance.note: T2 viewport-scoped + debounced rebuild bounds CPU; no unbounded per-keystroke work

gap_checklist_compliance.skip_reason: No external HTTP dependencies introduced; all decoration runs client-side over already-fetched markdown

gap_checklist_compliance.note: Input format is markdown; @codemirror/lang-markdown handles parsing. Raw HTML embedded in markdown is constrained by S2 (textContent only).

gap_checklist_compliance.skip_reason: Editor is single-user per browser tab; no shared state across requests

iterations.result: Discovered 16 constraints across 5 categories; 1 added via pre-mortem (O3)
Found 8 tensions, 7 resolved, 1 unresolved (TN1 pending m3 verification)
Derived 13 required truths; binding constraint = RT-1 (GFM availability); recommended Option A (Full V1 as specified)

blocking_dependencies.note: If GFM extensions are not reachable via @lezer/markdown without adding a new top-level dep, U2's table/image scope is blocked. m3 must verify before m4 generates code.
